1.) Meri wife ki delivery 27.01.2025 ko hui.                     2.) 10.02.2025 ko stitches cut hue.                                 3.) 23.02.2025 ko 2 stitches mai se discharge  aya.                                       4.) apni gynecologist dr. ko consult kiya dr. ne kha hota h kisi-Kisi ke sath antibiotic medicine di one week ke liye lene ko bola or dressing ki fever bhi continue tha hi.                     5.) 01.03.2025 ko same hospital mai MBBS,MD dr. ko consult kiya unhone CBC OR URIN test karwane ko kha or meri wife ko examin karke or 5 days ki medicine di                                 6.) 07.03.2025 ko dr. se consult kiya TLC report mai increase tha jiska meaning dr. ne infection batya or 05 days ki medicine di 7.) 20.03.2025 but fever tha dr. ne 5 days ki medicine di.          8.) 28.03.2025 ko dr. again consult kiya 05 days ki medicine li per jab koi relife nahi hua dr. ne kha ki mai isko minor opreaion hoga kiyo ki medicine bhi li dressing bhi hui but skin to skin 9.) 13.04.2025 ko suchering kiya 3 layer open kiya or 7 stitches lagye wo isliye ki sabhi stitches ache se heal ho jaye.                  10.) 21.04.2025 ko 3 stitches cut hue or 25.04.2025 baki 4 stitches cut hue or dressing 10 day ki medicine di dr. ne.         10
11.) 01.05.2025 ko again discharge start again one stitches dr. ko 02.05.2025 ko consult kiya dr. ne 2  test karwane ko kha HbA1c or Plasma glucose PP report normal thi 5day ki medicine repeat ki same.                         12.) Jab humko kuch relife nahi laga to mai apni wife ko Artimist hospital Gurgaon mai gynecologist ko dikaya dr. ne examin kiya or apne prescription per sari history ko lika or humko advice kiya ki ye delivery se problem nahi h itna time nahi problem hoti stitches mai ye kich or h app inko kisi surgeon ko dikha humare hi hospital mai ek surgeon h dr. Rakesh durkhure.                                    13.) Humm same time same day per dr. Rakesh durkhure surgeon ke pass gaye unhone examin kiya meri wife ko or ek MRI ATENTERIOR ABDOMINAL WALL LOWER ABDOMEN karane ko bola or is MRI ki report ke sath milne ko kha.                             14.) Humne MRI ki report or Jo bhi Artimist hospital Gurgaon mai dr. se discuss kiya wo humne apni old gynecologist dr. ko bhi discuss kiya unhone MRI report ko dekh ker kha ki ye delivery ke baad nahi hota isko operation se discharge thik kiya jayega or infected part ko lab mai bhejenge.                 15.) Humm 15.05.2025 ko report ke sath mile dr. se unhone kha ki inko MRI mai utrine sinus aya h isko operation se discharge dignos kiya jayega medicine se nahi hoga or unhone apne prescription per sari details ko likha or TPA desk per humne sare documents submit kiye 17.052025 ko.                   16.) 17.05.2025 ko merko initial approval bheja insurance walo ne jismai hospital ne 1,35,528 rs ka package diya tha 40k initial approval bheja or baki discharge ke time full & final payment karte insurance wale but mere Ghar walo ne kha ki hospital ka distance ghar se kafi dur h or room ka 2000 se uper nahi denge or uper se Kitna Dena pade pata nahi phir bacha bhi chota h isliye Maine surgery apni phale wali gynecologist dr. se hi karwana sahi laga MRI report ko mai apni gynecologist dr. Phale wali ko bhi share ki unhone bhi wohi kha MRI report ko dekh kar Jo Artimist ke dr. ne kha or after operation hum is sinus track ke part ko lab mai culture test ke liye bhejenge Taki pata lage root cause kiya h ye discharge ane ka.             17.) 18.05.2025 ko maine operation karwa diya or 20.05.2025 ko discharge mil gaya hospital se 18.05.2025 ko sample lab mai bhejha usmai report mai meri wife ko tuberculosis h is wajha se discharge nahi ruk rha tha.      18.) Same dignos ke liye jab mai apko apke network hospital se same documents TPA desk ke through diya to apne 135528 ke bill ko accept Karke 40k ka initial approval bheja diya or approval bhi apki dr. team se consult karke hi aya hoga or Jo documents diye usmai sari history clear mention thi or ye same dignos kuck fund issue or hospital distance ki wajha se maine apni old gynecologist se operation karwaya jiska bill 78,798 rs ka amount ko ab app maternity se related kar rahe ho apki dr. team kha rahi h app merko clause 3.1.1.8. ka likha hua dikha rahe h phale kiyo nahi dekha apki dr. team ne. Please reply.
